ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value used for the decision at the node */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature used for the decision */,
  "left_children_id" INTEGER /* ID of the left child node */,
  "right_children_id" INTEGER /* ID of the right child node */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class label assigned to the node */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of node (e.g., root, internal, leaf) */,
  "node_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the node */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the node was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the node was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nodes_class FOREIGN KEY ("class") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nodes_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nodes_right_children_id FOREIGN KEY ("right_children_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nodes_left_children_id FOREIGN KEY ("left_children_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data the feature holds (e.g., categorical, numerical) */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of feature (e.g., categorical, numerical) */,
  "feature_importance" REAL /* Importance of the feature in the decision tree model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Value of the threshold */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the threshold's purpose */,
  "threshold_type" TEXT /* Type of threshold (e.g., greater than, less than) */,
  "threshold_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the threshold */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the threshold was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the threshold was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "parent_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent node */,
  "child_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child node */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., parent-child, sibling) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_relationships_parent_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_relationships_child_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "class_weight" REAL /* Weight of the class in the decision tree model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "input_vector" TEXT /* Vector representation of the input data */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class label for the data point */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_data_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "input_vector" TEXT /* Vector representation of the input data */,
  "predicted_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the predicted class */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "prediction_probability" REAL /* Probability of the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_predicted_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("predicted_class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "evaluation_metric" TEXT /* Evaluation metric used (e.g., accuracy, F1 score) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date on which the performance was measured */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, analyst, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., train, predict) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., API, web interface) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event occurred */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
